entry.title: But I'm a Firefighter
entry.summary:
Author: LochNessieMonster

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,330Chapters: 3/7Kudos: 16

Summary: Buck never gets a clean bill of health after the ladder truck. Buck spirals.

entry.title: Leave the Door Open
entry.summary:
Author: aastranova

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,376Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 285

Summary: Eddie Diaz is a single father just trying to settle into a new house with his son, Christopher. Evan Buckley lives next door, working at his sister’s café and minding his own life…until the day Christopher trips in the driveway.

entry.title: Finding Those Lost
entry.summary:
Author: Not_Ren_42

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 34,562Chapters: 10/24Kudos: 300

Summary: Evangaline ‘Buck’ Buckley has made a home for herself in LA. After the long and difficult path to get here, she doesn’t think there is much left to surprise her. She has a new family, her son is thriving, and she’s loving her work as a firefighter. So what if sometimes the dark still comes for her some nights?When a new firefighter starts at the station, everything Buck thought she knew is thrown up in the air as she tries to keep her past and private life together. Things only get worse when dispatch starts messing the whole station around. -+- A season 2 rewrite that won't make much sense unless you've read part 1. New chapter every Friday :)

entry.title: grapejuice
entry.summary:
Author: thegreaterdivide

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,430Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 22

Summary: Eddie Diaz has had worse moments. Don't get him wrong, this is probably near the bottom; sitting in a makeshift closet, hiding behind turnout coats, the pale blue light of his screen reflected back at him. Eddie: Can you please just bid on me for the auction? Maddie: Are you being serious? Eddie thinks of replying, “This is a joke! Haha, a prank, got you, didn’t I? I actually have a better solution. If you hear anything about a bomb threat, fear not; everything is under control.   OR: When Eddie asks Maddie to bid on him for the auction, it sets off a series of events that Eddie definitely planned for.

entry.title: Time in a bottle
entry.summary:
Author: DaniWib

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,091Chapters: 4/7Kudos: 91

Summary: After the failed intervention at Athena's house, Buck fled, his disbelief quickly swallowed by a rising tide of fury. Hen’s rant about no one caring echoed in his ears, each word piercing deep until his vision burned red. No one cared? No one? He had cared! He had tried to hold everyone together, checking in, reaching out, desperately trying to stop the 118 from falling apart. But they made it clear Buck's efforts weren’t wanted, weren’t needed, or in Hen’s case, didn’t even count. Just when Buck’s hurt and anger finally overflowed, he encountered someone with the power to change it all. A crossroads demon. [Fic is complete, chapters posted weekly Friday & Tuesday nights AEST]

entry.title: Blinding Sunlight
entry.summary:
Author: ditzyoracle

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,393Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 209

Summary: Buck is the sun. Blinding and too revealing. He shines a light on all that Eddie wants to hide. So, Eddie’s body will act on his behalf. It doesn’t allow his heart to lead, instead, Eddie looks at Buck and squints. It’s best that he looks at Buck from a distance, from the corner of his eye, it allows him to drink Buck in without playing his hand.-Or Buck has a one night stand while out with Eddie and they both have feelings about it.

entry.title: My Life as Derek
entry.summary:
Author: nfarious

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 39,189Chapters: 26/26Kudos: 160

Summary: After surviving a traumatic kidnapping by Bonnie and Earl, who tried to force him into the role of their brain-dead son Derek, Evan "Buck" Buckley convinces himself the ordeal is behind him and skips therapy. On his way home from the station late at night, he is violently ambushed and abducted again—this time by an unseen captor wearing a grotesque Halloween mask. He awakens with a splitting headache inside an enormous, twisted adult-sized "nursery" painted in pastel blue, with giant block letters on the wall reading **DEREK’S NURSERY**. The room is a nightmarish blend of infantilizing comfort and dungeon-like control: oversized crib with steel bars, massive changing table with restraints, shelves of thick printed diapers, a playpen, and a huge rocking chair. Buck realizes his ordeal isn't over and that someone else wants him to be Derek. Question now is who and why?

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: The Sunlight Of My Life
entry.summary:
Author: Pnk_strawberry1

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 46,709Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 220

Summary: When Eddie left for Texas, Buck told himself he’d be fine. He had the house, the memories, and the silence — too much of it.Then a stranger shows up at his door with news that knocks the air out of him: he’s the father of an eight-year-old girl named Alina Marie Monroe.Oh — and her mother’s dead.When Eddie finally comes home, the two of them fall into a rhythm that feels almost like a family. Almost.But love gets complicated when it’s the one thing neither of them has ever had the courage to name. Between bedtime stories, quiet mornings, and the ghosts of what-ifs, Buck and Eddie begin to realize that sometimes family isn’t something you find — it’s something you build, one heartbeat at a time.Or:Buck becomes a dad. Eddie comes home. And somewhere between friendship and forever, they find the sunlight again. ☀️Ft A short Christopher & Alina Side Story!

entry.title: photos on the wall
entry.summary:
Author: kryptonian

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,014Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 213

Summary: “I need a photo of you,” Chris says. “N-Now?” Buck looks down at himself: long gloves, meatball hands, denim apron. This is not exactly Instagram-worthy material. Beneath the apron, he’s wearing a stretched-out shirt of Eddie’s that still smells of his cologne at the collar. He holds up his hands, brows raised. “I’ve got meatballs on my hands.” “No. It’s for school. I need a photo of you now.” Oh. That’s fine. Buck’s got plenty of candid shots he can email Christopher’s way. Eddie’s no photographer, but he’s always been good at catching Buck at the right angle. But then, shattering Buck’s delight in being part of Chris’s project, he continues: “And one when you were a kid.” “Oh.” Dread injects itself into his veins—Buck barely has any photos from his childhood, half because his parents never cared enough to take them, but half because he doesn’t exactly like looking at them. He doesn’t look like himself in them. Long blonde hair, itchy dresses, hollow eyes and skin that never fit quite right. “Um. What’s the project?”Or: Buck comes out to Chris.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The ultimate mother son team up
entry.summary:
Author: Ficalicious

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,535Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 143

Summary: “Being a realtor doesn’t give you the legal right to fly over her property.” Buck piped up as he reached the small group, earning a slightly surprised look from the man. “You may have been given permission by the owners of the home that you’re trying to film but you didn’t get this ladies permission which means you were still breaking the law.”“Thank you Buck-“ Athena shot him an amused look and Buck shot her a grin back.“Just coming over to check on you.”“And to make up for missing family dinner hm?”“You know it mama.”...A call involving a drone comes in and Buck and Athena don't like the man behind the drone.

entry.title: The Kiss of Life
entry.summary:
Author: Starryyy55

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,646Chapters: 3/4Kudos: 26

Summary: An rewrite of what goes down in 8x18,"Seismic Shifts"When instead of Ravi and Buck zip lining out of the building, Buck doesn't make it out. Eddie has to find another way to save him before time runs out. Yet Eddie gets trapped as well, and now their both on borrowed time. That panic ignites something in the both of them."Smoke billowed into the sky, distorting the usual coral blue of the California atmosphere. It’s unlike anything he had ever experienced before going into a disaster.His breathing slows and he just stares.A grip on his shoulder, right in the space where his neck and chest meet, brings him back to reality. A spot that Eddie had favored, and constantly used to get Buck’s attention. When Eddie told him he doesn’t trust anyone as much as him with Christopher. That painfully unforgettable split second where Eddie welcomed him back to the land of the living, with that damn knowing smirk. That steadying moment after Buck told Eddie he’s bisexual. Every time he felt that familiar touch, Buck knew he was being brought back from whatever unusual or unsafe place. It was like their version of a pinky promise. The promise being; whenever Buck felt lost, Eddie would know how to find him."

entry.title: See Me For Me
entry.summary:
Author: Need_lifeline

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,519Chapters: 5/6Kudos: 200

Summary: Eyes darting around each ‘face’ in the parking lot, sweat suddenly sticking uncomfortably to his body, breath quickening, legs speeding up, even though his knee is aching from the sudden random strain, even if it’s begging him to slow down. He doesn’t know what’s going on but he’d rather not stick around and find out. Everything in Buck is telling him to run. Run fast and far and don’t look back. Once Buck reaches his jeep, he immediately gets inside and locks all his doors as if speedrunning a Guinness World Record. Then, he finally takes a deep breath, the eyes are out there, but they can’t reach him from inside. He can finally take a deep, very oxygenated breath—just to have his breath stuck in his throat again. No. Who is that? What is that? Looking back at him in the vanity mirror, staring into him, mocking him…was him, but it wasn’t. Everything was wrong. Buck couldn’t recognize the face in front of him just knows that it’s copying his movements, even the timing in his blinks, trying to be him, but not quite getting it right.   OR: During the grocery store fight Buck develops prosopagnosia (face blindness). How will he survive not recognizing anyone and with his family hating him?

entry.title: I don't know what I do if something happened to you
entry.summary:
Author: CarpeDiem911

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 27,937Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 159

Summary: Bobby’s last words leave Buck lost in grief and guilt, slowly pulling him inward.As he retreats, Eddie is left on the outside, grasping for a connection that keeps slipping through his fingers.Sometimes, distance hurts more than loss.And sometimes, it takes everything breaking apart to bring two people back together.

entry.summary:
Author: GerardDunbar

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 22,537Chapters: 24/?Kudos: 410

entry.title: Take My Hand (You'll Like It)
entry.summary:
Author: sn4keb1tes

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 41,982Chapters: 8/15Kudos: 112

Summary: Somewhere between watching them leave and contemplating on the ridiculousness of his situation with Mr. and Mrs. Williams, Buck willed himself to walk out of the station. He didn't really remember how he got to his car, all he knew was that his hand was on the handle to open the door. He was about to get in when Eddie came up behind him and said, “You're coming over.” “Are you asking me or telling me?” “Telling, follow me home.” Buck's very rarely, if ever, been one to tell Eddie no so he did what Eddie told him to, he followed him home. He'd follow Eddie into an active volcano, following him to 4995 South Bedford was nothing.Or: Buck and Eddie are in love with each other, their souls have known it since they met each other, their minds, however, take a while to catch up. Or: Eight year long situationship turns into an eleven year long situationship after very ill advised sex.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: cup of buck
entry.summary:
Author: slugcity

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,709Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 80

Summary: Despite Buck making himself very hard to get to know when they first met, Eddie knew what Buck liked. It was all a part of the Best Friend title, which he was maybe less loud about compared to Buck, but he did take pride in it. He was Buck’s Best Friend, so he bought his coffee. That was his job.

entry.title: They say pain is an illusion, This is just a bruise, and You are just confused, but I am only human
entry.summary:
Author: FairyTailDragonKing

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,042Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 15

Summary: Buck finds something in hopes to reconnect with Christopher and slowly reconnect with Eddie and the rest of the 118 after dropping the lawsuit and being iced out. What happens when what he finds makes his life so much worse in ways no one can even understand or realize until it's too late?

entry.title: A Post-Glee World
entry.summary:
Author: RaeWritesOccasionally

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,727Chapters: 1/16Kudos: 21

Summary: “I would’ve pictured you giving,” is all Eddie says, followed by a squeak from Buck. “Jesus, Eddie,” Buck runs a large hand down his face, the edges of his mouth peeking through, “You’ve pictured me, huh?” or Eddie opens up to Buck that he feels like he never got to explore with his sexuality since he got married and became a dad so young, religious upbringing, etc. Buck makes it his mission to see if Eddie likes to kiss boys. They both get off on it. Tags will be fixed and updated as its posted
